---
title: "Publications"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<!-- Formatting notes: use callouts to specify article type https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/callouts.html -->
<!-- .callout-note = empirical -->
<!-- .callout-caution = review -->
<!-- .callout-important = neuro -->
<!-- Don't include icons (icon="false") -->

If you would like to learn more about my research, there are links below to published and pre-print copies of articles as well as data and code repositories. Please email me if you cannot access any of the published materials. A full list of my work can also be found on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Iw0DI-IAAAAJ&hl=en). 

***

<!-- MIDUS -->
::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Perceived Relational Support Is Associated With Everyday Positive, But Not Negative, Affectivity in a U.S. Sample

*Personality and Social Psychology Bulletin* (2024)

Virginia Ulichney | **Helen Schmidt** | Chelsea Helion

<a href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/01461672231224991" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Article</a>&nbsp;<a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/agc3v" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Pre-print</a>&nbsp;<a href="https://osf.io/f4kav/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Data + Code</a>
:::

<!-- SURVIVOR BEHAVIORAL -->
::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Conversational Linguistic Features Predict Social Network Learning

*Psychonomic Bulletin & Review* (invited resubmission)

**Helen Schmidt** | Sophia Tran | John D. Medaglia | Virginia Ulichney | Chelsea Helion

<a href="https://osf.io/preprints/psyarxiv/fn4my" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Pre-print</a>&nbsp;<a href="https://osf.io/8wqhb/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Data + Code</a>
:::

<!-- STORYTELLING -->
::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Storytelling changes the content and perceived value of event memories

*Cognition* (invited resubmission)

Devlin Eckardt | Chelsea Helion | **Helen Schmidt** | Janice Chen | Vishnu Murty

<a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4481365" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Pre-print</a>&nbsp;<a href="https://osf.io/puyf4/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Data + Code</a>
:::

<!-- FRIGHT NIGHT -->
::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Emotion regulation strategy usage in a dynamic, high-intensity context

*Journal of Experimental Psychology: General* (invited resubmission)

William Mitchell | Joanne Stasiak | Steven Martinez | Kate Cliver | David Gregory | **Helen Schmidt** | Vishnu Murty | Chelsea Helion

<a href="https://europepmc.org/article/ppr/ppr577219" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Pre-print</a>&nbsp;<a href="https://osf.io/j5sku/?view_only=89d87669e7674096819c439ca109c483" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" role="button">Data + Code</a>
:::

***

A selection of my conference presentations can be found [here](selected-posters.qmd){target="_blank"}. All presentations are listed on my [CV](files/SchmidtCV-Website.pdf){target="_blank"}.
